## Test Results
**pytest failed:** 1 test failure found
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py`
**Test:** `TestWorktreeCreationSchema::test_invalid_issue_number_type`
**Issue:** Error message mismatch - Expected regex: `'issue_number must be an integer'` - Actual message: `'plan_number must be an integer'`
The test expects an error message about `issue_number` but the schema is raising an error about `plan_number` instead. This appears to be a schema validation issue in: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/schemas.py` (line 75)
